plan.claimBoundary: Catalog registration makes a source fetchable, not executable. Only a compiler and entry gate can promote raw bytes into a governed routing, occurrence, or rendering artifact.

claimBoundary: Successful fetching proves byte capture and identity only. No fetched source is routable, simulated, or hosted until its compiler and entry gates pass.
